画passrates的直方图

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.hist(passrates, bins=30, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7)
plt.xlabel('Pass Rate')
plt.ylabel('Frequency')
plt.title('Distribution of Pass Rates')
plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.show()
```

如果你想要更详细的可视化，可以添加统计信息：

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.hist(passrates, bins=30, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7)
plt.xlabel('Pass Rate')
plt.ylabel('Frequency')
plt.title('Distribution of Pass Rates')

# 添加统计信息
mean_pr = np.mean(passrates)
median_pr = np.median(passrates)
plt.axvline(mean_pr, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label=f'Mean: {mean_pr:.3f}')
plt.axvline(median_pr, color='green', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label=f'Median: {median_pr:.3f}')

plt.legend()
plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# 打印统计信息
print(f"Mean: {mean_pr:.3f}")
print(f"Median: {median_pr:.3f}")
print(f"Std: {np.std(passrates):.3f}")
print(f"Min: {np.min(passrates):.3f}")
print(f"Max: {np.max(passrates):.3f}")
```

续写完这个代码

```python
p_0 = []
p_0_02 = []
p_02_04 = []
p_04_06 = []
p_06_08 = []
p_08_1 = []
p_1 = []

anns = load_jsonl("/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/data/intern-s2/MMMU_Pro/annotation.jsonl")
for ann in tqdm(anns):
    prompt = ann["prompt"][0]["content"][0]["text"].replace("<IMG_CONTEXT>", "")
    if prompt not in grouped_by_prompt:
        continue
    v = grouped_by_prompt[prompt]
    pr = sum(v) / len(v)
    if pr == 0:
        p_0.append(ann)
    elif 0 < pr < 0.2:
        p_0_02.append(ann)
    elif 0.2 <= pr < 0.4:
        p_02_04.append(ann)
    elif 0.4 <= pr < 0.6:
        p_04_06.append(ann)
    elif 0.6 <= pr < 0.8:
        p_06_08.append(ann)
    elif 0.8 <= pr < 1.0:
        p_08_1.append(ann)
    elif pr == 1.0:
        p_1.append(ann)

# 打印各区间的统计信息
print(f"Pass Rate = 0: {len(p_0)} samples")
print(f"Pass Rate (0, 0.2): {len(p_0_02)} samples")
print(f"Pass Rate [0.2, 0.4): {len(p_02_04)} samples")
print(f"Pass Rate [0.4, 0.6): {len(p_04_06)} samples")
print(f"Pass Rate [0.6, 0.8): {len(p_06_08)} samples")
print(f"Pass Rate [0.8, 1.0): {len(p_08_1)} samples")
print(f"Pass Rate = 1: {len(p_1)} samples")
print(f"Total: {len(p_0) + len(p_0_02) + len(p_02_04) + len(p_04_06) + len(p_06_08) + len(p_08_1) + len(p_1)} samples")
```

```python
save_jsonl(p_0, "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/data/intern-s2/MMMU_Pro/pass_rate_0.jsonl")
save_jsonl(p_0_02, "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/data/intern-s2/MMMU_Pro/pass_rate_0_02.jsonl")
save_jsonl(p_02_04, "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/data/intern-s2/MMMU_Pro/pass_rate_02_04.jsonl")
save_jsonl(p_04_06, "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/data/intern-s2/MMMU_Pro/pass_rate_04_06.jsonl")
save_jsonl(p_06_08, "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/data/intern-s2/MMMU_Pro/pass_rate_06_08.jsonl")
save_jsonl(p_08_1, "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/data/intern-s2/MMMU_Pro/pass_rate_08_1.jsonl")
save_jsonl(p_1, "/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmit/user/lvchengqi/data/intern-s2/MMMU_Pro/pass_rate_1.jsonl")

print("All files saved successfully!")
```
